Boris Samorodov <bsam@passap.ru> wrote
  in <50806475.2070404@passap.ru>:

bs> Hi and sorry for a delay.
bs>
bs> I think that the consensus was that:
bs> a) a drop-in replacement is preferred;
bs> b) Hiroki Sato (the tex ports maintainer) is working on it.
bs>
bs> So I think that we may wait for a while.
bs>
bs> Hiroki-san, should I switch this PR to you?

 Yes, please.  Thank you!

-- Hiroki
